description: Register a new account. Requires an invite code if the server has invite-only registration enabled.

handle.description: Requested handle (3-30 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens).

password.description: Password (10-128 chars, must contain 3 of 4 categories).

inviteCode.description: Invite code (required if server has invite-only registration).

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or validation failed.

errors.name: InviteRequired
errors.description: Invite code required but not provided.

errors.name: InviteUsed
errors.description: Invite code has been fully used.

errors.name: AccountExists
errors.description: Handle or email already in use.
